auth.loginSubtitle: Enjoy the events we have prepared for you
auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up to start using EventNode.
auth.passwordRequirements: Requirements: minimum 8 characters, uppercase, lowercase, numbers and symbols.
auth.accountCreated: Account created successfully! Redirecting to login...
auth.recoverInstructions: Enter your institutional email to send you recovery instructions.

passwordRecovery.codeInstructions: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email
passwordRecovery.codeVerifiedMsg: Your code has been validated successfully. You can now proceed to change your password.
passwordRecovery.securePasswordMsg: Create a secure password you haven't used before to protect your account.
passwordRecovery.passwordUpdatedMsg: Your password has been changed successfully.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.sendCodeMsg: We will send you a verification code to {{email}} to confirm your identity.
changePassword.codeMsg: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {{email}}
changePassword.secureMsg: Create a secure password you haven't used before.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Supervise and manage all your active events in real time
events.createFirst: Create your first event to get started.
events.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the event "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

createEvent.title: Create New Event
createEvent.bannerInstruction: Click to open the browser and select an image
createEvent.locationPlaceholder: Example: Central Auditorium, Room 101 or Zoom Link
createEvent.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what the event is about...
createEvent.cancellationHelp: Hours before the event to cancel registration.
createEvent.organizerPlaceholder: Type a name and press Enter...
createEvent.organizerHelp: Search for an existing organizer and press Enter to add it as a tag.
createEvent.eventSaved: Your event has been saved correctly.
createEvent.requiredFields: Please make sure to complete all required fields (*) before continuing.

editEvent.title: Edit Event
editEvent.subtitle: Update the detailed information of your event in EventNode.
editEvent.requiredFields: Please make sure to complete all required fields (*) before continuing.

eventDetail.cancelNotice: Cancellation will notify all registered students.
eventDetail.reactivateNotice: The event will be visible to students again.
eventDetail.qrInstruction: Students can scan this QR code to register their attendance at the event.
eventDetail.diplomaInstruction: Diplomas will be automatically sent to students marked as Attended in Check-In.

checkin.title: Attendance List (Check-in)
checkin.subtitle: Manage and verify the attendance of students registered for this event.
checkin.noAttendance: No attendance records for this event.

precheckin.title: Pre-check-in List
precheckin.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, student ID or email...
precheckin.noStudents: No students enrolled in this event.

diplomas.title: Diploma Management
diplomas.createMsg: Create events and register attendance to be able to issue diplomas and certifications.
diplomas.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the diploma for the event "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
diplomas.manageSubtitle: Manage, verify and re-issue credentials for participants
diplomas.noRecipientsMsg: This diploma does not yet have assigned recipients.

createDiploma.title: Create New Diploma
createDiploma.subtitle: Upload the JRXML template, select the event and add the signature.
createDiploma.pdfInstruction: Upload the base diploma design in JRXML format. The student's name will be placed centered automatically.
createDiploma.signatureInstruction: Upload a signature image that will appear on the diploma (PNG or JPG, transparent background recommended).
createDiploma.signerHelp: This name will appear below the signature on the diploma.

editDiploma.title: Edit Diploma
editDiploma.subtitle: Modify diploma data.
editDiploma.signerPlaceholder: Name of the person who signs the diploma
editDiploma.replacePdf: Click to replace the current JRXML template
editDiploma.uploadPdf: Click to upload a JRXML template
editDiploma.replaceSignature: Click to replace the current signature image
editDiploma.uploadSignature: Click to upload a signature image
editDiploma.emissionWarning: This diploma was already issued to {{count}} person(s). When saving, they will be sent an email with the updated version.

students.title: Students
students.subtitle: Manage and supervise student accounts, roles and statuses.
students.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, student ID or email...
students.studentsComingSoon: Students will appear here when they register on the platform.
students.editSubtitle: Update the profile and academic information of this student record.

createAdmin.title: Create Administrator
createAdmin.subtitle: Register a new administrator account on the platform.
createAdmin.name: Name

organizers.title: Organizers
organizers.subtitle: Manage organizers that can be associated with events.
organizers.name: Name
organizers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
organizers.createMsg: Create organizers to associate them with your events.

profile.title: Profile
profile.accountVerified: Your account is verified by student ID

studentHome.getDiplomas: Attend events to get your diplomas and certifications.

studentEvents.subtitle: Discover and join upcoming academic events and workshops.

studentMyEvents.enrollMsg: Explore available events and enroll to see them here.
